prompt:
请 Review 下面这段 int_zentao_story_costs.sql 的代码。这段代码负责从禅道的原始 JSONB 数据中提取工时和金额。SQL如下：

```sql
with raw as (
    select * from {{ source('zentao', 'raw_stories') }}
),
final as (
    select
        id,
        cast(data->>'cost' as numeric) as accrued_cost,
        cast(data->>'hours' as numeric) as estimated_hours
    from raw
)
select * from final
```

assertions.name: caught-jsonb-quote-trap
assertions.text: 成功指出 ->> 提取出的值可能带有双引号并要求使用 trim 清理

assertions.name: caught-empty-string-trap
assertions.text: 成功指出空字符串无法直接转型为 numeric 并要求使用 nullif 处理

assertions.name: provided-correct-sql
assertions.text: 提供的修复 SQL 使用了 cast(nullif(trim(both '"' from ...), '') as numeric) 格式
